title: Universal Tool Graphite Crucible for Melting Gold Silver Metals (Many Sizes)
description:
Melt gold and silver with the ToolTreaux Graphite Crucible. This crucible is perfect for melting precious metals such as gold, silver, aluminum, copper and brass. Crucibles can come in handy for a number of hobby projects, including jewelry making, metalworking and gold prospecting. Just add your metal in, melt it and get to work! Make sure you grab one of these before your next metalworking project.

Universal Tool Graphite Crucible for Melting Gold and Silver (Many Sizes)
Melt gold and silver with the Universal Tool Graphite Crucible.
Key Features
  • GRAPHITE CRUCIBLE: This compact graphite crucible is great for working with small samples of materials and metals, no matter what your project or task is (6 sizes available)
  • SMELTING METAL: Made from durable graphite with high corrosion and high impact resistance that allows for a long working; featuring excellent thermal conductivity and temperature resistance
  • METAL REFINEMENT: Crucibles can come in handy for a number of hobby projects, including jewelry making, metalworking and gold prospecting. Just add your metal in, melt it and get to work
  • PROPER CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Store in dry place when not in use; important to thoroughly dry after use if graphite crucible becomes wet; this will ensure your graphite crucible is a reliable melting tool
  • JEWELRY CASTING TOOL: Used for precious metal refinement; working with gold, silver, platinum, brass and other alloys in a wide range of industries including metallurgy, metal casting, calcining, laboratory testing, gold prospecting or melting precious metals for jewelry making and design
Specifications
MPN: CRPHCPARENT
UPC:
Material: Graphite
Uses: Jewelry making, metal refinement, gold prospecting, etc.
Sizes available: 6
